v1.0.1.description:
Initial Release of the Dawnsbury Days Archipelago mod.

To install the Archipelago world, double download and double click the dawnsbury.apworld file. Only the person running the archipelago server needs to do this. For convenience, I've attached a copy of the player options template file as well, but you can also just generate this with archipelago.

To install the game mod, extract DawnsburyDays_Mod.zip and put its contents in the CustomMods folder inside of your Dawnsbury Days game folder. Or, download the mod from the steam workshop instead.
v1.0.1.title: Initial Release

v1.1.description:
v1.1 Release Changes:
- Fixed 0harmony.dll conflict with other mods that use it.
- Added encounter randomization difficulty option (so you don't fight the final boss first, unless you want to)
- Added server/client version checking (it will give you a warning if they are different)

To install the Archipelago world, double download and double click the dawnsbury.apworld file. Only the person running the archipelago server needs to do this. For convenience, I've attached a copy of the player options template file as well, but you can also just generate this with archipelago.

To install the game mod, extract DawnsburyDays_Mod.zip and put its contents in the CustomMods folder inside of your Dawnsbury Days game folder. Or, download the mod from the steam workshop instead.
v1.1.title: v1.1 Release

v1.1.1.description: Updating the mod to make it compatible with the game's new .NET and harmony versions.
v1.1.1.title: v1.1.1: .NET Hotfix

v1.2.description:
Updated the mod with support for The Profane Barrier DLC.

Other changes:
 - Moved the archipelago button so its no longer on top of the workshop button.
 - Fixed the default world seed re-randomizing on startup.
 - Removed Offline Mode
v1.2.title: v1.2: The Profane Barrier

v1.3.description:
This update adds several things:
- Property runestones are now supported. You can equip property runestones on any item, regardless of fundamental runes, but characters can only wield items for which they have enough weapon potency upgrades to use. eg, if Tok'Dar has +1 weapon potency, he can use weapons with up to 1 property rune.
- Added a configuration option to drop runestones in encounter loot instead of automatically awarding bonuses. Note that because of synchronization with how these are saved in game, this can misbehave in some cases, thus the feature is experimental.
- Updating Messaging: archipelago messages now pop up on screen notifications when you get them! The old combat log still exists, and now should also update more frequently.
- Shields will now scale their hardness with your armor potency bonus (this isn't exactly correct per pf rules, but its extremely close).
- You can no longer buy illegal items in the campaign shop.
- Fixed a couple of instances where the merged campaign wasn't handling its levels correctly.
- Fixed some archipelago synchronization errors.
v1.3.title: v1.3: Runes and Toast

v1.3.1.description:
This hotfix patch will fix the bug which prevents the setup menu from loading if you do not have a saved connection already. It also uses the new mod hook for the menu button, rather than trying to draw it in the corner manually (it should automatically be in the right spot now).

The apworld has not changed, this patch only affects the game mod.
v1.3.1.title: v1.3.1: Hotfix - Setup Menu Caching bug
